sections.paragraph:
Θεγρί, ὁ indecl. Thegri Hv 4, 2, 4, an angel in charge of animals. On him and his name s. MDibelius, Hdb., exc. ad loc., and s. Σεγρί.

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

Hv Hv = Visions

Hdb. Hdb. = Handbuch (in connection with a specific NT book, the ref. is to a commentary in the series Handbuch zum Neuen Testament, founded by HLietzmann)—List 6

exc. exc. = except

ad loc. ad loc. = ad locum (to or at the place under consideration)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 446
